/usr/bin/c++ -Wno-error=unused-result -Werror=return-type  -std=c++11 -O3 -g -pipe -Wall -Werror -Wno-unused-variable -lrt -pthread -fno-strict-aliasing -Wno-error=shadow -Wno-sign-compare CMakeFiles/TcpClentTest.dir/TcpClentTest.cpp.o -o TcpClentTest   -L/home/yjt/tmms/lib/jsoncpp/lib64  -L/home/yjt/tmms/lib/jsoncpp/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/yjt/tmms/lib/jsoncpp/lib64:/home/yjt/tmms/lib/jsoncpp/lib ../../libnetwork.a ../../../base/libbase.a ../../../../json-prefix/lib/libjsoncpp.a
